name: No-Bake Peanut Butter Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dates, raisins, and nuts in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Stir in the molasses. Add peanut butter, stirring until well combined.
3. Stir in 2 tablespoons of orange juice.
4. Add enough of the remaining orange juice to form a moist mixture that can be formed into balls.
5. Roll into 1/2-inch balls and roll each ball into shredded coconut.
6. Store in an airtight container out of direct sunlight.
7. Let sit for at least 1 day before serving.
